languages.text: {n}Сгусток плазмы подпаливает ваши волосы, но пролетает мимо. Сраженный ответным выстрелом мужчина валится навзничь. Как только его тело касается пола, фигуры вокруг вас приходят в движение, Иокаста отрывисто отдает приказы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Сгусток плазмы подпаливает ваши волосы, но пролетает мимо. Сраженный ответным выстрелом мужчина валится навзничь. Как только его тело касается пола, фигуры вокруг вас приходят в движение, Иокаста отрывисто отдает приказы{/n}

languages.text: {n}A glob of plasma misses you by inches, but still singes your hair. Struck by return fire, the man falls flat on his back. As soon as his body hits the floor, the figures around you spring into action, Sauerback barking out orders.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Сгусток плазмы подпаливает ваши волосы, но пролетает мимо. Сраженный ответным выстрелом мужчина валится навзничь. Как только его тело касается пола, фигуры вокруг вас приходят в движение, Иокаста отрывисто отдает приказы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A glob of plasma singes your hair but misses you by a hair's breadth. Struck by return fire, the man falls flat on his back. As soon as his body hits the floor, the figures around you spring into action, Jocasta barking out orders.{/n}

{n}A glob of plasma singes your hair but misses you by a hair's breadth. Struck by return fire, the man falls flat on his back. As soon as his body hits the floor, the figures around you spring into action, Jocasta barking out orders.{/n}

{n}A glob of plasma misses you by inches, but still singes your hair. Struck by return fire, the man falls flat on his back. As soon as his body hits the floor, the figures around you spring into action, Jocasta barking out orders.{/n}

{n}A glob of plasma misses you by inches, but still singes your hair. Struck by return fire, the man falls flat on his back. As soon as his body hits the floor, the figures around you spring into action, Jocasta barking out orders.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eine Plasmakugel verfehlt dich um Haaresbreite. Vom Gegenfeuer getroffen, fällt der Mann flach auf den Rücken. Als sein Körper den Boden berührt, wird deine Umgebung aktiv und Sauerback bellt einige Befehle.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A glob of plasma misses you by inches, but still singes your hair. Struck by return fire, the man falls flat on his back. As soon as his body hits the floor, the figures around you spring into action, Sauerback barking out orders.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eine Plasmakugel verfehlt dich um Haaresbreite. Vom Gegenfeuer getroffen, fällt der Mann flach auf den Rücken. Als sein Körper den Boden berührt, wird deine Umgebung aktiv und Sauerback bellt einige Befehle.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une gerbe de plasma vous frôle de quelques centimètres, brûlant quelques mèches de vos cheveux. Touché par les tirs de riposte, l'homme s'effondre sur le dos. À peine son corps a-t-il touché le sol que des silhouettes se précipitent autour de vous au son des ordres aboyés par Sauerback.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A glob of plasma misses you by inches, but still singes your hair. Struck by return fire, the man falls flat on his back. As soon as his body hits the floor, the figures around you spring into action, Sauerback barking out orders.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une gerbe de plasma vous frôle de quelques centimètres, brûlant quelques mèches de vos cheveux. Touché par les tirs de riposte, l'homme s'effondre sur le dos. À peine son corps a-t-il touché le sol que des silhouettes se précipitent autour de vous au son des ordres aboyés par Sauerback.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一团等离子火球以毫厘之差擦过，却还是烧焦了你的头发。那人被还击的火力命中，仰面倒地。他的身体一触及甲板，周围的人影就行动起来，苏尔贝克厉声下着令。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A glob of plasma misses you by inches, but still singes your hair. Struck by return fire, the man falls flat on his back. As soon as his body hits the floor, the figures around you spring into action, Sauerback barking out orders.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一团等离子火球以毫厘之差擦过，却还是烧焦了你的头发。那人被还击的火力命中，仰面倒地。他的身体一触及甲板，周围的人影就行动起来，苏尔贝克厉声下着令。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El disparo de plasma pasa a escasos centímetros de ti, quemando tu pelo. El hombre, abatido por el contraataque, cae de espaldas al suelo. En cuanto su cuerpo cae, la gente que te rodea entra en acción, acatando las órdenes que grita Sauerback.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A glob of plasma misses you by inches, but still singes your hair. Struck by return fire, the man falls flat on his back. As soon as his body hits the floor, the figures around you spring into action, Sauerback barking out orders.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El disparo de plasma pasa a escasos centímetros de ti, quemando tu pelo. El hombre, abatido por el contraataque, cae de espaldas al suelo. En cuanto su cuerpo cae, la gente que te rodea entra en acción, acatando las órdenes que grita Sauerback.{/n}

languages.text: {n}プラズマの塊があなたの髪を焼くが、髪の毛一本分ほど外れる。応戦した男は仰向けに倒れる。彼の体が床に落ちると同時に、周囲の人物が行動を開始し、ジョカスタが命令を吠える。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A glob of plasma singes your hair but misses you by a hair's breadth. Struck by return fire, the man falls flat on his back. As soon as his body hits the floor, the figures around you spring into action, Jocasta barking out orders.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bir plazma küresi seni santimlerle ıskalıyor ama yine de saçını kavuruyor. Karşılık ateşiyle vurulan adam, sırtüstü yere düşüyor. Vücudu yere çarpar çarpmaz etrafındaki figürler harekete geçiyor, Sauerback emir yağdırıyor.{/n}
